extra.reason: Completed by backing up .beads to /tmp and reinitializing the repository with bd init --from-jsonl using the preserved issues.jsonl export.
Added .codex to .gitignore so local Codex workspace metadata stays out of git status.
Added env-driven Terraform and dress config generation so local runs no longer require infra/prod.tfvars by default, and documented the new backend/vars flow.
Removed env aliasing and fallback discovery, switched local Terraform inputs to canonical TF_VAR exports, and kept only explicit backend config generation for dress and backend init.
